tasks.subject: SR-T1: StatsManager injected-client constructor + lifecycle no-ops + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** StatsManager accepts RedisClientType | string; injected path makes connect/disconnect no-ops and cleanup skip disconnect; string path keeps legacy create-and-own. Extend StatsManager.test.ts with injected no-op lifecycle, cleanup del-not-disconnect, increment->hIncrBy delegation, getValue->hGet, error-path (reject->0) for increment and getValue, legacy construct-without-connect. increment/getValue/checkThreshold/saveStateToDisk/loadStateFromDisk/ensureTtl unchanged.

**Files:** src/class/StatsManager.ts, src/class/StatsManager.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/StatsManager.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/class/StatsManager.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ctor accepts RedisClientType | string", "injected connect/disconnect no-op", "cleanup del-not-disconnect on injected", "increment->hIncrBy delegation", "error-path reject->0", "legacy construct-without-connect", "existing tests stay green"]}
```

tasks.subject: SR-T2: wire sharedRedis into StatsManager at main.ts:545 + fix stale comment
tasks.description:
**Goal:** main.ts:545 constructs new StatsManager(sharedRedis, id, storagePath || '.'); the comment at main.ts:564-565 no longer says StatsManager owns its own client. tsc clean, no other line changes.

```json:metadata

```

tasks.subject: SR-T3: crawler-service CLAUDE.md docs (replace line 384 note)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the false 'StatsManager still opens its own Redis client. Deferred follow-up' note (CLAUDE.md:384) with the migrated state: StatsManager now uses the injected shared client (ownsClient=false), conn count 1, legacy URL ctor retained, spec link.
